notes:
### v1.2.5

#### Fixed
- MeowConnect log time ranges use encounter duration. Single-gate LOA Logs rows now show fight start through fight end, while combined multi-gate rows show the first gate start through the final gate end using fight_start plus encounter duration.
- Tracking roster-wide toggles stay centered. Roster-wide buttons in Settings > Tracking now use the same sticky centered layout as To Do, so they stay centered in the visible matrix area instead of requiring horizontal scrolling.
- MeowConnect static highlights are raid-specific. Static reservation colors in Raid Together now only apply when the character has a matching reservation for the selected raid and difficulty, preventing unrelated static reservations from marking another raid as reserved.

#### Improved
- Manual MeowConnect logs show a single time. Manual clear log rows now show their timestamp once instead of rendering a redundant start-end range such as 11:06 - 11:06, while LOA Logs rows keep their fight duration range.
- MeowConnect shared static frames are easier to distinguish. Characters reserved for a static that includes you now use a subtle grey-green frame, matching the quieter grey-red treatment used when you are not part of the static.
- MeowConnect friends are sorted more predictably. Accepted friends now list static friends first, then sort the rest alphabetically by display name.
- MeowConnect header status is more compact. The global MeowConnect status now shows only the MeowConnect icon and state label, removing the repeated MeowConnect text prefix.
- Updates labels no longer imply clickability. Changelog and known issue labels no longer animate or change shadow on hover, keeping hover feedback reserved for actual clickable controls.
- Dashboard character navigation is easier to click. Dashboard character cards now open the matching To Do character filter from the class icon, character name, iLvl, and CP areas instead of requiring a precise click on the name.
- Character removal now requires deliberate confirmation. The roster character remove button now opens a custom confirmation dialog with Keep Them and Evaporate actions, and Evaporate stays disabled for five seconds before the character can be removed from active app tabs.
- Dashboard To Do shortcuts no longer recolor stats. Hovering the clickable dashboard iLvl and CP areas no longer changes their text color; the tooltip is enough to indicate the To Do shortcut.
- MeowConnect friend ordering is consistent. MeowConnect friend lists and Raid Together profile groups now use static-first alphabetical ordering instead of shifting each raid frame by availability counts.
- Dashboard roster hover no longer shifts layout. Dashboard roster frames now use a subtle highlighted frame on hover instead of moving upward, keeping the roster list visually stable.
- Raid settings collapse respects tracking state. Raids marked as tracked in Settings > Tracking now remain visible in Settings > Raids when empty-row collapse is enabled, even if they do not yet have gold, box, or static gate settings.

#### Added
- Header countdown can be hidden. General settings now includes a header countdown toggle for users who want to hide the daily and weekly reset timer from the global app header.
- Tracking and Raid settings can hide empty rows. Settings > Tracking and Settings > Raids now have a compact header control that collapses rows where the current roster has nothing tracked or configured, remembers the preference, and updates the visible rows immediately without needing to swap tabs.
